name: Jellio++
description:
This plugin provides integration between Jellyfin and the Jellio++ service.
Fork of InfiniteAvenger/jellio-plus, updated for Jellyfin 12.0.0-rc1.

versions.changelog:
## What's New

### Jellyseerr Download Status
When content is not in your Jellyfin library, the stream list now shows the current download status from Jellyseerr:

- **📥 Request via Jellyseerr** — Content not yet requested (click to request)
- **📥 Requested — waiting for download** — Request approved, download pending
- **🔄 Downloading — tap to refresh** — Content is actively downloading
- **✅ Available — processing in Jellyfin** — Downloaded, waiting for library scan

### Improvements
- TMDB ID caching (24h) reduces redundant Jellyseerr search API calls
- Shared HTTP client factory for Jellyseerr requests
- Automatic re-check of Jellyfin library when Jellyseerr reports content as available

### Bug Fixes
- Removed AV1 from direct streaming codecs (Stremio web player compatibility)

### Commits since v1.7.2.0
- feat(jellyseerr): show download status in Stremio stream list
- Add Jellio++ (wujekbogdan) to fork history
- Rename to Jellio+++ and update manifest URL
- fix: remove AV1 from direct streaming codecs
- feat: add transcoding settings with direct streaming support
- feat(subtitles): serve text subtitles from Jellyfin to Stremio

## Fix

- Remove AV1 from direct streaming codecs
- Stremio web player shows black screen with AV1 video
- AV1 is now transcoded to H.264 while HEVC/H.264 still direct stream

This fixes the black screen issue while preserving quality for HEVC and H.264 content.
